name: [KranzTV] share.publish success rate below 95%
message:
KranzTV share publish success rate has fallen below 95% over the last hour.

Likely causes:
- Cloudflare KV outage (`outcome:kv_error` spike) → check https://www.cloudflarestatus.com
- Rate-limit pressure (`outcome:rate_limited` spike) → indicates abuse or a runaway client
- Schema regression (`outcome:invalid` spike) → recent deploy introduced bad payload validation

Dashboard: kranz-tv-shared-channels
Runbook: docs/SHARING.md#observability

@slack-alerts
